name: ai-page-summarizer-extension
description: Manifest V3 Chrome Extension for summarizing article pages through a secure AI proxy.

scripts.check: node --check background/service-worker.js && node --check content/content-script.js && node --check popup/popup.js && node --check proxy/mock-server.js && node --check proxy/openai-server.js && node --check proxy/gemini-server.js && node --check utils/constants.js && node --check utils/extractor.js && node --check utils/sanitizer.js && node --check utils/storage.js
